manipulate.label: Validate Bonus Action Availability
manipulate.code: if data.current_player["b_action_available"] != true data.reason = 0 return else data.reason = 9 return end

manipulate.label: Use Unavailable: Bonus Action Unavailable
manipulate.code:
data.title = "#, you have already used your bonus action!" data.message = "Please wait..."
data.usable_items = [] data.use = false

manipulate.label: Validate Equipment Availability
manipulate.code:
equipment = data.current_player["equipment"]
unless !equipment.empty? data.reason = 1 return else data.reason = 9 return end

manipulate.label: Use Unavailable: Equipment Empty
manipulate.code:
data.title = "#, you have no items to use!" data.message = "Please wait to select another action..."
data.usable_items = [] data.use = false

manipulate.label: Validate Equipment Applicability
manipulate.code:
# --- Helper --- def has_potion?(equipment, prefix) equipment.any? { |x| x.to_s.start_with?(prefix.to_s) } end
# --- Check Equipment Availablity ---
equipment = data.current_player["equipment"]
# --- Determine Needs ---
need_heal = (data.current_player["hp"].to_i < data.current_player["max_hp"].to_i) need_mana = (data.current_player["mana"].to_i < data.current_player["max_mana"].to_i) need_adr = (data.current_player["adrenaline"].to_i < data.current_player["max_adrenaline"].to_i) need_stability = (data.current_player["insanity"].to_i > 0)
# --- Check Potion Availability for Need ---
can_heal = need_heal && has_potion?(equipment, "healing") can_mana = need_mana && has_potion?(equipment, "mana") can_adr = need_adr && has_potion?(equipment, "adrenaline") can_stability = need_stability && has_potion?(equipment, "stability")
# --- Build Usable Item List --- usable = [] usable << "Healing Potion" if can_heal usable << "Mana Potion" if can_mana usable << "Adrenaline Potion" if can_adr usable << "Stability Potion" if can_stability
if usable.empty? data.reason = 2 return else data.reason = 9 data.usable_items = usable return end

manipulate.label: Use Unavailable: No Applicable Items
manipulate.code: data.title = "#, you cannot use an item right now!" data.message = "None of your items apply right now. Please wait to select another action..." data.usable_items = [] data.use = false

manipulate.label: Use Available
manipulate.code: data.title = "#, you may use an item!" data.use = true data.message = "Please select an item from your equipment..."
